reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para tomar un descanso. Cuenta cin todo los servicios, está sobre la Ruta 22 lo que permite no desvisrte si estás en viaje.
Sanitarios impecables.
Cordial y rápida la atención.
Recomiendo marcarla en tu hoja de ruta, yo ya lo hice! 🫠

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to take a break. It has all the amenities and is located on Route 22, so you don't have to undress while traveling.
Spotless restrooms.
Friendly and prompt service.
I recommend marking it on your itinerary; I already have! 🫠
